message:
fix: crew session cycling for non-gastown rigs (bd-crew-*)

parseCrewSessionName returned the rig name derived from the prefix
fallback ("bd"), but findRigCrewSessions then called PrefixFor("bd")
which looked up rigToPrefix["bd"] — a miss, since the registry maps
"beads" → "bd". It fell back to DefaultPrefix "gt", so cycling from
bd-crew-emma searched for gt-crew-* sessions and failed.

Fix: pass the prefix directly from the parsed identity through to
findRigCrewSessions, avoiding the broken round-trip through the
registry. Also add "bd-" to the tmux.conf grep pattern so the
keybinding triggers gt cycle for beads sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
